body_txt: A mostly comedy trope. Two people are in the process of getting together and having a date. The more they try to keep it on the down-low, the more likely it is that everybody they know is spying on 'em. The peepers usually overlap with Shipper on Deck , sometimes even trying to speed things up with the "lucky" couple. Other times they have the specific goal of ruining the thing , which may result in a Bad Date . Compare Stealth Escort Mission . Truth in Television , although perhaps not as common as fiction would have you believe.
